gift_id.description: GiftItem ID this multiplier applies to (or 'all')

min_combo.description: Minimum combo count to trigger this multiplier

max_combo.description: Maximum combo count for this tier

bonus_creator_rtv.description: Extra RTV bonus to creator at this combo level

bonus_platform_rtv.description: Extra RTV to platform at this combo level

effect_color.description: Hex color for the combo effect
